---
description: Create release paperwork in BC Gov Jira — RFCs, RFDs, RFD-subtasks, deployment booking — using the RAVEN Jira MCP tools.
---

Follow the playbook in [docs/RFD_PLAYBOOK.md](../../docs/RFD_PLAYBOOK.md) exactly — it is the single source of truth for what to create, the required fields, the hard gates (confirm before every write; never transition or book a slot without an explicit ask), and the summary/description style. Trust live `get_field_meta` results over any remembered process details. Requires the RAVEN `jira` MCP server from `.mcp.json` to be connected.
